citation: Hutchison, C.A. III, Chuang, R.-Y., Noskov, V.N., et al. Design and synthesis of a minimal bacterial genome. Science 351, aad6253 (2016).
notes: Original design + synthesis of JCVI-Syn3.0 / Syn3A. Source for the canonical gene list (transposon-derived essential/non-essential/quasi-essential classification), genome design rationale, and initial characterization. JCVI-Syn3A is the Syn3.0 derivative with 19 genes restored to improve morphology; this is the strain all downstream simulation work uses.
